info.title: La Growth Machine API
info.description: La Growth Machine (LGM) external API for managing campaigns, leads, audiences, identities, members, inbox messaging, and website visitor webhooks. Authenticate using an API key passed as the `apikey` query parameter. Rate limited to 50 calls per 10 seconds per API key.

get.description: Retrieve all your campaigns with pagination support.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: Number of items to skip (0 minimum), used for pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items to return per query (25 max).

200.description: Successful response with list of campaigns.

get.description: Retrieve a single campaign by its ID.
Retrieve engagement statistics for a campaign.

200.description: Successful response with campaign engagement stats.

get.description: Retrieve per-lead statistics for a campaign. Supports cursor-based pagination using lead IDs.

parameters.name: getLeadsAfter
parameters.description: Lead ID to fetch leads after (for forward pagination).

parameters.name: getLeadsBefore
parameters.description: Lead ID to fetch leads before (for backward pagination).

200.description: Successful response with lead stats for the campaign.

count.description: Total number of leads in the campaign.

hasMore.description: Whether there are more leads after this page.

hasLess.description: Whether there are leads before this page.

200.description: Successful response with list of audiences.

post.description: Create a new audience or add leads to an existing audience from a LinkedIn search or post URL. Requires a connected LinkedIn identity with the widget open.

audience.description: Name of your existing audience or new audience.

linkedinUrl.description: URL from LinkedIn search or LinkedIn post.

identityId.description: ID of your identity. LinkedIn must be connected and widget must be open.

linkedinPostCategory.description: Filter leads by LinkedIn post engagement type.

excludeContactedLeads.description: Excludes leads who have already been contacted.

404.description: Identity not connected or widget not open.

get.description: Retrieve all your identities (connected accounts used for outreach).

200.description: Successful response with list of identities.

get.description: Search for a lead by various criteria. At least one search parameter should be provided.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Searches in both proEmail and persoEmail.

200.description: Successful response. Returns the lead if found, or null.

post.description: Create a new lead or update an existing one. The lead is matched by leadId, linkedinUrl, proEmail, persoEmail, or twitter. An audience name is required.

audience.description: Audience name to add the lead to.

leadId.description: Lead ID (for updating an existing lead).

excludeContactedLeads.description: Excludes leads who have already been contacted.

post.description: Update the status of a lead in one or more campaigns. The lead is identified by leadId, linkedinUrl, proEmail, persoEmail, twitter, or crm_id.

campaign.description: Campaign name, array of campaign names, or "all" for all campaigns.

leadStatus.description: New status of the lead (present when updated).

reason.description: Reason the lead was not updated (present when not updated).

post.description: Remove a lead from one or more audiences. The lead is identified by crm_id, linkedinUrl, proEmail, persoEmail, twitter, or name+company.

audience.description: Audience name, array of audience names, or "all" to remove from all audiences.

get.description: Retrieve all members of your account.

200.description: Successful response with list of members.

get.description: Retrieve all registered inbox event webhooks.

200.description: Successful response with list of inbox webhooks.

post.description: Register a new webhook to receive inbox events (e.g., new messages, replies).

campaigns.description: Array of campaign IDs or ["all"] for all campaigns.

delete.description: Delete an inbox event webhook by its ID.

post.summary: Send a LinkedIn Message to a Lead
post.description: Send a LinkedIn direct message or voice message to a lead. Provide either a text message or an audio URL, not both. Identify the lead by leadId or linkedinUrl.

identityId.description: Identity ID to send the message from.

leadId.description: Lead ID. Provide leadId or linkedinUrl, not both.

linkedinUrl.description: Lead LinkedIn URL. Provide leadId or linkedinUrl, not both.

message.description: Text message to send. Provide message or audioUrl, not both.

audioUrl.description: Audio URL for a voice message. Provide message or audioUrl, not both.

200.description: Message sent successfully. Returns the lead details.

404.description: Invalid request (e.g., missing message or audioUrl).

post.summary: Send an Email Message to a Lead
post.description: Send a custom email to a lead using a connected email identity. Supports HTML and text formats, reply threading, CC and BCC.

html.description: HTML version of the email body.

text.description: Plain text version of the email body.

identityId.description: Identity ID to send the email from.

replyInLastThread.description: Whether to reply in the last email thread.

subject.description: Email subject (required if not replying to a previous message or thread).

200.description: Email sent successfully. Returns the lead details.

post.description: Add or replace a note on an inbox conversation. The conversation can be identified by conversationId, leadId, email, or linkedinUrl.

mode.description: Whether to replace the existing note or append to it.

post.description: Endpoint for RB2B integration. Copy this URL into your RB2B dashboard to automatically push website visitors identified by RB2B into an audience named 'RB2B_Website_Visitor'.
Endpoint for Warmly integration. Copy this URL into your Warmly dashboard to automatically push website visitors identified by Warmly into an audience named 'Warmly_Website_Visitors'.

Webhook Sent At.description: Timestamp when the webhook was sent.

post.description: Endpoint for Vector integration. Copy this URL into your Vector dashboard to automatically push website visitors identified by Vector into an audience named 'Vector_Website_Visitors'.

apiKeyAuth.name: apikey
apiKeyAuth.description: API key retrieved from your LGM account settings at https://app.lagrowthmachine.com/settings/api

userId.description: User ID of the campaign owner.

channels.description: Channels used in this campaign (e.g., LGM, TWITTER, GOOGLE, LINKEDIN).

leadsCount.description: Number of leads in the campaign.

userId.description: User ID of the audience owner.

size.description: Number of leads in the audience.

importationPending.description: Whether an import is currently pending.

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Manage and retrieve campaign data and statistics.

tags.name: Identities
tags.description: Retrieve connected identities used for outreach.

tags.name: Leads
tags.description: Create, search, update, and manage leads.

tags.name: Inbox
tags.description: Send messages, manage webhooks, and edit conversation notes.

tags.name: Website Visitor
tags.description: Native webhook endpoints for third-party website visitor identification tools (RB2B, Warmly, Vector).
